checks.name: doctor_command

checks.fix_hint: Add <cli> health per SKILL.md mandatory triad.

checks.name: repair_command
checks.fix_hint: Add <cli> repair per SKILL.md mandatory triad.

checks.name: repair_dry_run
checks.fix_hint: Document and implement repair --dry-run as the default safe mutation surface.

checks.name: validate_command
checks.fix_hint: If this CLI handles state, add validate <thing>; otherwise document why state-handling is out of scope.

checks.name: audit_command
checks.fix_hint: If this CLI mutates state, add audit with provenance; otherwise document why state-handling is out of scope.

checks.name: why_command
checks.fix_hint: If this CLI stores or mutates objects, add why <id> provenance tracing; otherwise document why state-handling is out of scope.

checks.name: json_flag
checks.fix_hint: Add --json everywhere and document it in root help.

checks.name: info_surface
checks.fix_hint: Add --info with version, config paths, env, dependencies, and runtime sha.

checks.name: examples_surface
checks.fix_hint: Add --examples or examples with curated workflows.

checks.name: topic_help
checks.fix_hint: Add help <topic> for major topics, distinct from --help.
